calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jul-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Petitioner: Thom W. Mitchell appeared with Counsel Judy Hitchcock.
Respondent: Jimmy Ray Thomas (no appearance).

The Stiputlation That Commissioner May Act As Judge Pro Tempore was signed by Counsel on behalf the Petitioner.
Petitioner was sworn and examined.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 50 yards away from the protected person: Thom W. Mitchell, the Residence; with the following exception as to the residence: as long as the parties continue to reside at the 540 Jones St., San Francisco, CA, there is a five yard stay away in effect.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Threaten, Harass, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail, Take Any Action, Directly or Through Others, to Obtain the Addresses or Locations of the Protected Persons.

The Defendant shall not own, possess, have, buy or try to buy, receive or try to receive, or in any other way get a gun or firearm.

Expires June 30, 2012.

Order signed in open court.
